query:
-- Inserir as fases do Gaúcho 2024 com base nas fases já presentes nos jogos
-- As fases encontradas: 1st_phase, quarter_finals, semi_finals, final
INSERT INTO tournament_phases (tournamentId, `key`, label, enabled, `order`, isKnockout)
VALUES
  (60001, '1st_phase',      '1ª Fase',           1, 10, 0),
  (60001, 'quarter_finals', 'Quartas de Final',   1, 50, 1),
  (60001, 'semi_finals',    'Semifinais',         1, 60, 1),
  (60001, 'final',          'Final',              1, 70, 1)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE label = VALUES(label);
